+# Execution Report
+
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-161
+AUTHOR: Executor / Claude
+TIMESTAMP: 2026-05-24_18-53-04+0300
+RELATED_FILES:
+- golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene — added typed raw component envelopes (Transform/Camera/Visibility on the existing camera entity, Transform/Light on a new KeyLight entity) and a second root entity entry
+- crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs — revised the schema test to pin canonical `rge::components::*` type_ids, exact raw RON payload strings, and a `ron::Value`-shape inspection that proves `fov_y_radians: 1.0471976` sits inside the Perspective projection variant
+- ai_handoffs/ISSUE-161_TASK_2026-05-24_18-35-49+0300.md — TASK packet executed by this report
+STATUS: AWAITING_REVIEW
+
+## Task Packet Reference
+
+`ai_handoffs/ISSUE-161_TASK_2026-05-24_18-35-49+0300.md`
+
+## Pre-Execution Review Consumed
+
+No pre-execution review issued for this dispatch.
+
+## What I Changed
+
+### Source
+
+- `golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene`: the camera entity (`0000000000000G000000000000`, name `Camera`) now holds three raw component envelopes in this order — `rge::components::Transform`, `rge::components::Camera`, `rge::components::Visibility`. The Transform payload is the canonical `"(translation:(0.0,0.0,5.0),rotation:(0.0,0.0,0.0,1.0),scale:(1.0,1.0,1.0))"` literal; the Camera payload is the canonical `"(projection: Perspective(fov_y_radians: 1.0471976, near: 0.05, far: 1000.0), viewport: (0.0, 0.0, 1.0, 1.0), priority: 0, is_active: true)"` literal pinning the FRAC_PI_3-compatible `fov_y_radians: 1.0471976` f32 spelling inside the `Perspective` variant; the Visibility payload is the raw RON variant string `"Visible"`. A second entity `KeyLight` with id `00000000000010000000000000`, empty relations, and the `rge::components::Transform` + `rge::components::Light` envelopes was added — its Light payload is the canonical `"(color:(1.0,1.0,1.0),kind:Directional(illuminance_lux:100000.0),affects_indirect:true)"`. `root_entities` now lists the camera id and then the light id in that order. Schema `version: "0.1.0"` and scene `name: "main"` are unchanged.
+
+### Tests
+
+- `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs::simple_scene_referenced_scene_parses_as_scene`: now asserts the full `root_entities` ordering (camera id then light id), verifies both root entries exist in `scene.entities`, and pins entity names (`Camera`, `KeyLight`) and empty relations. The legacy `assert!(root.components.is_empty(), "schema fixture stays untyped")` check is gone — the fixture is intentionally typed now.
+- `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs::simple_scene_camera_entity_has_canonical_typed_components`: new test. Pins the camera's `ComponentValue.type_id` ordering to `["rge::components::Transform", "rge::components::Camera", "rge::components::Visibility"]`, asserts each `ComponentValue.data` matches the canonical raw literal byte-for-byte, parses each payload through `ron::from_str::<ron::Value>` to prove the raw RON shape, and asserts the visibility payload parses to `ron::Value::Unit` (i.e. the `Visible` unit-variant identifier).
+- `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs::simple_scene_camera_payload_pins_fov_y_radians_inside_projection`: new test. Parses the camera payload with `ron::Value`, navigates the outer map's `projection` field into the inner map (which holds the Perspective variant's body, since `ron::Value` strips the enum name), and asserts the `fov_y_radians` field carries the parsed float value of the `1.0471976` literal. Also asserts `viewport` is a 4-element `Value::Seq` and that the raw payload string contains the exact `"fov_y_radians: 1.0471976"` substring inside `"Perspective("` — together this proves the literal is bound to the Perspective variant's `fov_y_radians` field, not merely a substring elsewhere.
+- `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs::simple_scene_light_entity_has_canonical_typed_components`: new test. Pins the KeyLight component ordering to `["rge::components::Transform", "rge::components::Light"]`, asserts the canonical raw literals, parses the Light payload as `ron::Value`, navigates `color` (3-element Seq) and `kind.illuminance_lux == 100000.0`, and asserts the raw string contains `"Directional(illuminance_lux:100000.0)"` so the value is bound to the `Directional` variant.
+- The existing manifest tests (`simple_scene_manifest_parses_as_project`, `simple_scene_manifest_with_required_field_removed_fails_to_parse`, `simple_scene_referenced_scene_with_required_field_removed_fails_to_parse`) are unchanged in intent.
+
+Helper module additions (test-local, private):
+- `load_simple_scene()` — small consolidation of the manifest-+-scene parse path; the existing free functions remain.
+- `find_component`, `parse_payload`, `expect_map`, `expect_seq`, `expect_float`, `get_map_field` — tiny `ron::Value`-shape helpers. No component crate is imported; no `Deserialize` impl other than `ron::Value` is used to inspect payloads.
+
+### Docs
+
+- None. The TASK packet forbids documentation edits.
+
+## Per-File Summary
+
+- `golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene` — see Source bullet above.
+- `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs` — see Tests bullets above. The file still uses only `rge_data` and `ron::value::{Number, Value}` (plus `std::fs`, `std::path::{Path, PathBuf}`); no component crate is referenced.
+
+## Verification Results
+
+- `git status --short --untracked-files=no` (pre-edit): clean (no tracked changes, exit 0).
+- `cargo test -p rge-data --test golden_simple_scene_schema` → exit 0; 7 passed / 0 failed / 0 ignored (added 3 new tests on top of the 4 pre-existing tests).
+- `cargo test -p rge-data --test golden_simple_scene_load_tick` → exit 0; 1 passed / 0 failed / 0 ignored. Run for safety even though the load+tick regression was not directly amended — confirmed the bridge still spawns 2 entities into the ECS world and the tick still advances.
+- `.\.ai\dispatch.verify.ps1` → exit 0; `VERIFY OK: all 7 verification step(s) passed.` Per-step timing:
+  - `[1] cargo +nightly fmt --check` — ok (1s)
+  - `[2] architecture lints` — ok (7s)
+  - `[3] architecture-lint test suite` — ok (1s)
+  - `[4] cargo deny check` — ok (2s)
+  - `[5] cargo test --workspace --all-targets` — ok (42s)
+  - `[6] cargo test --workspace --doc` — ok (16s)
+  - `[7] cargo bench -p rge-script-bench --no-run` — ok (1s)
+- `git status --short --untracked-files=no` (post-edit, post-report): two tracked file modifications, both inside the TASK's MAY-edit envelope —
+  - ` M crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs`
+  - ` M golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene`
+
+(An initial nightly fmt pass failed on rustfmt cosmetics in two new helper functions and was auto-resolved by `cargo +nightly fmt --all`; the verify gate re-run above passed.)
+
+## Deviations from Task Packet
+
+None — execution stayed strictly within the Task Packet scope. Only `golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene` and `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs` were edited. No `Cargo.toml` or `Cargo.lock` change. No component crate (`components-spatial`, `components-render`, `components-visibility`) is imported by the revised test; payload shape is validated through `ron::Value` only. No kernel, editor, script, gfx, brep-render, io-*, asset-store, macros-reflect, or other production crate was touched. No new files were added beyond this dispatch's own `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-161_EXEC_*.md` report and its `.meta.json` sidecar (created by `-Finalize`).
+
+## Open Questions for Reviewer
+
+- Float-variant note: with `ron 0.12.1`, parsing unsuffixed floats like `1.0471976` and `100000.0` through `ron::Value` yields `Number::F64`, not `Number::F32`, even though the source intent is an `f32` literal. The new helper `expect_float` accepts either variant and widens F32 to f64 before the comparison, so the assertions compare against the f64 literals `1.047_197_6_f64` and `100_000.0_f64`. The `f32` intent is still pinned because the raw payload string is asserted byte-for-byte and the substring `"fov_y_radians: 1.0471976"` is required to appear inside `"Perspective("`. Please confirm this is the intended boundary — assert byte-shape for the f32 spelling, but inspect numeric value through Value's loose float typing — given that `rge-data` deliberately does not depend on a strongly-typed component crate.
+
+## Worktree State
+
+- Tracked files: modified — `golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene`, `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs`. No other tracked-file changes.
+- Untracked items: `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-161_TASK_2026-05-24_18-35-49+0300.md`, `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-161_TASK_2026-05-24_18-35-49+0300.meta.json` (the inbound TASK packet + its sidecar from this dispatch), and `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-161_EXEC_2026-05-24_18-53-04+0300.md` (this report). The matching `.meta.json` sidecar will appear on `-Finalize`.
+- Branch: `ai-dispatch/ISSUE-161`.
+- Last commit: `cb33e555fa800bc328731ccd89fe9a26ef7141e4` chore(dispatch): mark task #37 DONE-BLOCKED + queue task #38
+
+---
+
+HANDOFF_STATUS: COMPLETE
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-161
+AUTHOR: Executor / Claude
+NEXT_ROLE: REVIEWER_AI
+EXIT_CODE: 0
+
+---

@@ -0,0 +1,305 @@
+# Task Packet
+
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-161
+AUTHOR: Planner / OpenAI Codex
+TIMESTAMP: 2026-05-24_18-35-49+0300
+RELATED_FILES:
+- .ai/dispatch.tasks.md
+- .ai/dispatch.verify.ps1
+- AI_DISPATCH_AUTOMATION.md
+- ai_handoffs/AI_HANDOFF_PROTOCOL.md
+- ai_handoffs/ISSUE-158_TASK_2026-05-24_16-29-59+0300.md
+- ai_handoffs/ISSUE-158_EXEC_*.md
+- golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene
+- crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs
+- crates/rge-data/Cargo.toml
+- Cargo.toml
+- Cargo.lock
+- ai_handoffs/ISSUE-161_EXEC_*.md
+- ai_handoffs/ISSUE-161_EXEC_*.meta.json
+- ai_dispatch_logs/log_*.md
+- GitHub issue #161
+STATUS: OPEN
+
+## Goal
+
+Fix GitHub issue #161 by adding typed raw component payloads to the golden
+`simple-scene` fixture and pinning their schema-level shape in the existing
+`rge-data` golden schema test. This is the implementation follow-up to the
+ISSUE-158 typed-payload preflight, with the human-specified canonical
+`ComponentValue.type_id` strings now fixed for `Transform`, `Camera`, `Light`,
+and `Visibility`.
+
+## Scope
+
+### MAY edit
+- `golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene`
+- `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs`
+
+### MUST NOT edit
+- Any file other than the two MAY-edit files above and this dispatch's own
+  generated `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-161_EXEC_*.md` report, optional matching
+  `.meta.json` sidecar, and queue-runner log if created by the automation.
+- Any `Cargo.toml` file, including the workspace `Cargo.toml` and
+  `crates/rge-data/Cargo.toml`.
+- `Cargo.lock`.
+- Any production source file under `crates/**`, `kernel/**`, `runtime/**`,
+  `editor/**`, or any other production source directory.
+- Any component crate, including `crates/components-spatial/**`,
+  `crates/components-render/**`, and `crates/components-visibility/**`.
+- Any kernel, editor, script, gfx, brep-render, io-*, asset-store, or
+  macros-reflect crate.
+- Any file under `.github/**`.
+- Any PowerShell script, shell script, schema, architecture lint, doctrine
+  document, status document, planning document, ADR, README, or root-level
+  repository document.
+- Any golden-project file other than
+  `golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene`.
+- Any test file other than
+  `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs`.
+- Any existing handoff packet or existing dispatch log, including this TASK
+  packet after execution begins.
+- Any GitHub issue, label, PR, branch, review, comment, commit, remote state,
+  or queue metadata except the queue runner's normal issue lifecycle for this
+  dispatch.
+
+### MAY add new files
+- Exactly one execution report matching `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-161_EXEC_*.md`.
+- The matching `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-161_EXEC_*.meta.json` sidecar only if
+  `new-handoff.ps1 -Finalize` creates it while finalizing the EXEC report.
+- This dispatch's own queue-runner log under `ai_dispatch_logs/log_*.md` only
+  if the queue runner creates it as part of normal dispatch operation.
+
+### MUST NOT add new files
+- New source files, test files, fixtures, golden-project files, generated
+  assets, cook output, screenshot baselines, renderer comparison artifacts,
+  docs, architecture docs, Cargo files, dependency files, schemas, scripts,
+  workflows, architecture lints, doctrine documents, status documents,
+  planning documents, ADRs, READMEs, TASK packets, REVIEW packets, CLOSEOUT
+  packets, issue notes, or design documents.
+- Any handoff packet other than this dispatch's single
+  `ISSUE-161_EXEC_*.md` report and optional matching `.meta.json` sidecar.
+
+## Deliverables
+
+- `golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene` keeps schema version
+  `0.1.0` and scene name `main`.
+- The existing camera entity keeps id `0000000000000G000000000000` and name
+  `Camera`.
+- The camera entity has exactly these raw component envelopes, using these
+  exact `ComponentValue.type_id` strings:
+  - `rge::components::Transform`
+  - `rge::components::Camera`
+  - `rge::components::Visibility`
+- The camera entity explicitly stores `Visibility::Visible` by using a
+  `ComponentValue` with `type_id: "rge::components::Visibility"` and raw
+  `data: "Visible"`. Do not rely on the component crate's `Inherited`
+  default.
+- The camera `Transform` payload data is exactly
+  `"(translation:(0.0,0.0,5.0),rotation:(0.0,0.0,0.0,1.0),scale:(1.0,1.0,1.0))"`.
+- The camera `Camera` payload data is exactly
+  `"(projection: Perspective(fov_y_radians: 1.0471976, near: 0.05, far: 1000.0), viewport: (0.0, 0.0, 1.0, 1.0), priority: 0, is_active: true)"`.
+  Do not use `1.0471975511965976`, `std::f32::consts::FRAC_PI_3`, or any
+  spelling other than `fov_y_radians: 1.0471976` in the fixture.
+- The camera `Visibility` payload data is exactly `"Visible"`.
+- The scene includes exactly one light entity named `KeyLight` with id
+  `00000000000010000000000000`, empty relations, and a `Light` raw component
+  envelope using exact `type_id: "rge::components::Light"`.
+- The light entity also has a `Transform` raw component envelope using exact
+  `type_id: "rge::components::Transform"`.
+- The light `Transform` payload data is exactly
+  `"(translation:(0.0,0.0,0.0),rotation:(0.0,0.0,0.0,1.0),scale:(1.0,1.0,1.0))"`.

+
+## Planner Notes
+
+ISSUE-158 established that raw `ComponentValue.data` payloads are schema-only
+safe in `rge-data`, but it routed canonical type-id ambiguity to human input.
+GitHub issue #161 supplies that decision: the fixture must use these exact
+scene-envelope type-id strings:
+
+```text
+rge::components::Transform
+rge::components::Camera
+rge::components::Light
+rge::components::Visibility
+```
+
+Keep the implementation intentionally narrow. The fixture should store raw RON
+strings; the test should parse those strings with `ron::Value` to prove the
+shape is valid RON and assert the expected field/variant facts. Do not import
+or depend on the actual component crates from `rge-data`.
+
+The intended raw payloads are:
+
+```text
+Transform: (translation:(0.0,0.0,5.0),rotation:(0.0,0.0,0.0,1.0),scale:(1.0,1.0,1.0))
+Camera: (projection: Perspective(fov_y_radians: 1.0471976, near: 0.05, far: 1000.0), viewport: (0.0, 0.0, 1.0, 1.0), priority: 0, is_active: true)
+Light: (color:(1.0,1.0,1.0),kind:Directional(illuminance_lux:100000.0),affects_indirect:true)
+Visibility: Visible
+```
+
+The literal `fov_y_radians: 1.0471976` must be present in the fixture and the
+test expectation. The test should also inspect the parsed `ron::Value` enough
+to prove that value belongs to the `fov_y_radians` field of the `Perspective`
+projection, not merely a substring elsewhere in the payload.
+
+Under the orchestrator protocol, no `_REVIEW_` or `_CLOSEOUT_` packet is
+expected from this TASK. The only new packet produced by execution should be
+the `ISSUE-161_EXEC_*.md` report, plus its optional generated sidecar and the
+queue runner's own log if applicable.
+
+Verbatim review-gate strings from the issue body:
+
+```text
+MUST use the rge-data scene-envelope ComponentValue.type_id strings exactly: "rge::components::Transform", "rge::components::Camera", "rge::components::Light", "rge::components::Visibility"
+MUST add Visibility::Visible explicitly on the camera entity, not rely on the Inherited default
+MUST use fov_y_radians: 1.0471976 as the FRAC_PI_3-compatible f32 literal for the camera's Perspective projection
+MUST edit only golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene and crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs (except the dispatch's own ai_handoffs/ packet)
+MUST NOT pull any component crate (components-spatial, components-render, components-visibility) into rge-data's dev-dependencies; use ron::Value for raw-payload shape validation
+MUST NOT touch any kernel, editor, script, gfx, brep-render, io-*, asset-store, macros-reflect, or any production source crate
+MUST NOT modify Cargo.toml or Cargo.lock; halt with NEEDS_HUMAN if either changes
+MUST run cargo test -p rge-data --test golden_simple_scene_schema and the canonical .ai/dispatch.verify.ps1 gate successfully
+```
+
